# OSTOIA&CO

> A digital studio specialising exclusively in boutique travel brands. Based in Milan, working globally.

OSTOIA&CO is a premium digital agency that builds brand identity, conversion-first websites, and digital authority for boutique travel operators. We work exclusively with adventure travel, cultural tour, and luxury travel brands — we do not serve hotels, airlines, or OTAs.

## Services

- **Brand Architecture**: Positioning, visual identity, tone of voice, and messaging strategy
- **Conversion Design**: Custom Next.js websites engineered around booking funnels
- **Digital Authority**: Technical SEO, content strategy, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation)
- **Full Package**: Complete digital transformation combining all three services

## Specialisation

We only work with boutique travel brands. This is a deliberate constraint — it allows us to develop deep expertise in how premium travellers discover, evaluate, and book experiences online.

## Notable Work

- **Routes&Roads** (USA, Adventure Travel): 3× direct bookings after full rebrand and new website
- **LocalWay Sicily** (Italy, Boutique Tours): 8.2% average conversion rate after booking funnel redesign
- **LED Travel** (Turkey, Cultural Journeys): #1 on Google Turkey for target keywords after SEO + GEO overhaul

## Contact

- Email: hello@ostoia.co
- Based in Milan, Italy
- Serving Europe, USA, and global markets
- Website: https://ostoia.co

## Journal

We publish monthly insights on digital strategy, conversion design, and AI search visibility for boutique travel brands at https://ostoia.co/journal
